subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is meet unto Him Who is the Desire of the world, Who through love created the world and through love set it aflame [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را لایق و سزاست که بمحبت عالم را خلق نمود و بمحبت مشتعل نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love of God, @suffering and imprisonment
